label: DeFi Lending
description: Lend, borrow, withdraw, or repay across DeFi protocols. Shows APY, health factor preview, and collateral ratios per asset.

0.1.note: WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx covers all grid widgets.

0.5.note: No direct lib/mocks/ imports; data via useDeFiData().

0.6.note: isLoading wired to FormWidget (synchronous context stub).

0.7.note: AlertTriangle empty state when no lending protocols.

0.8.note: FormWidget error prop wired via useFormSubmit.

l0.notes: All 9 checks green. Prior fixes: AlertTriangle empty state, isLoading stub, mock annotation removal.

1.1.note: Widget reads all data via useDeFiData() hook.

1.2.note: Context calls useGlobalScope() and filters by hasDefiDesk.

1.3.note: Org filter empties lendingProtocols when no DeFi desk org selected.

1.4.note: clientIds acknowledged; LendingProtocol has no clientId field — deferred to BP-5.

1.6.note: Empty scope arrays return all data (hasDefiDesk defaults true).

1.7.note: KNOWN-GAP: reference data in lib/mocks/fixtures/; BP-5 scope.

l1.notes: 1.4 partial: client-level cascade deferred to BP-5 schema change.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab + f9f29ea. 65 automated tests. Re-audit only if wiring test fails.

3.1.note: Relevant modes: live ✓ / paper ✓ / batch: order entry should be disabled.

3.2.note: defi-data-context.tsx reads useGlobalScope() but does not consume scope.mode. No mode-based data switching implemented yet.

3.5.note: Paper mode spec: widget should render read-only (no Execute button); identical data to live but submission blocked.

3.6.note: No WebSocket or interval in this widget — synchronous context only. N/A for 3.6.

l3.notes: 3.2: Mode not read from scope — deferred to BP-5 context update. 3.3/3.4: Human must verify batch-mode button disable. 3.7: Paper toggle not yet exposed in UI.

4.1.note: No dead buttons. All onClick handlers are functional (setOperation, handleSubmit, setAsset, setMaxSlippageBps).

4.2.note: No href='#' links. No links at all.

4.6.note: No per-render entitlement checks. Entitlements checked at page level.

l4.notes: 4.3/4.4/4.7/4.8: Human walkthrough required. Agent-verifiable checks all pass.

5.1.note: Target strategies: YIELD_ROTATION_LENDING (Aave multichain USDC), CARRY_RECURSIVE_STAKED (recursive lending/staking). Operations: LEND, BORROW, WITHDRAW, REPAY.

l5.notes: 5.2-5.6: Human walkthrough required for execution flow verification.

l6.notes: L1.5 harness spec: 17 tests covering render, operation toggle, amount input + reactive expected-output, health factor preview, execute-button enable/disable + executeDeFiOrder payload, protocol switching, empty-protocols AlertTriangle path. See tests/widgets/defi/defi-lending-widget.test.tsx. Pattern pilot for rollout per unified-trading-pm/plans/ai/ui_widget_test_rollout_2026_04_24.plan.

7.1.note: No hardcoded hex/rgb/hsl colors. Tailwind semantic tokens used throughout.

7.2.note: No mock data in widget file. All data via useDeFiData().

7.3.note: 287 lines — within 500-line limit. No function >200 lines.

7.4.note: DeFiLendingWidget PascalCase. File kebab-case. Hooks useCamelCase.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.6.note: No dangerouslySetInnerHTML, eval, new Function, innerHTML= found.

7.7.note: useEffect deps stable ([selectedProtocol, asset]). No inline objects in deps.

l7.notes: All mechanical checks pass or deferred (7.5 i18n globally deferred).

8.1.note: text-[10px] migrated to text-micro utility backed by --text-micro token (0.625rem) in globals.css @theme. Current usages: line 80 (protocol venue_id sublabel), 218 (HF Current label), 231 (HF After label). Line 119 APY sublabel was removed in 2026-04-21 layout refactor.

8.2.note: No p-[...] or gap-[...] arbitrary spacing found.

8.3.note: Uses Button, Input, Select from components/ui/*. FormWidget shared primitive used.

8.4.note: Agent: no wrappers (text-xs text-muted-foreground class). Interactive buttons have accessible text. Human: keyboard + screen-reader pass required.

l8.notes: 8.1 deferred pending --text-label-micro token. 8.5 resize test: human required.

keepSeparate.rationale: Lending is a distinct action flow (LEND/BORROW/WITHDRAW/REPAY) separate from Staking/Swap/Transfer.

relationships.notes: Peers with defi-health-factor (both show health factor). Master relationship may emerge if detail panel added for position.

dataContract.notes: Current: synchronous mock via defi-data-context. Production: REST to DeFi protocol service for APY, health factor.

gaps.notes: CeFi lending (Binance Earn, Bybit) — deliberately out-of-scope.
Cross-LST rotation not directly supported — separate archetype needed.
CARRY_RECURSIVE_STAKED recursive loop: Aave V3 supported; alt protocols declared in UAC but not full-loop tested.

findings.description: getAssetParams and calculateHealthFactorDelta originate in lib/mocks/fixtures/defi-protocol-params but are surfaced through DeFiDataContextValue — widget accesses via useDeFiData().
findings.fix: Widget reads via context hook, not direct mock import.

findings.description: Widget did not pass isLoading to FormWidget.
findings.fix: Added isLoading=false stub wired to FormWidget.

findings.description: Empty state showed plain text 'No lending protocols (mock).'
findings.fix: Upgraded to AlertTriangle error UI and removed '(mock)' annotation.
Deleted mock annotations from empty state, collateral ratio label, and toast description.

findings.description: Client-level cascade not wired — clientIds acknowledged in context but LendingProtocol has no clientId field.
Reference data remains in lib/mocks/fixtures/. Moving to lib/constants/ is BP-5 scope.
~18 user-visible strings (labels, button text, toast messages) present in widget.
findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21

findings.description: defi-lending-widget.tsx:80,119,217,230 — text-[10px] used for sub-xs label sizing in dense layout.
findings.fix: Replaced text-[10px] with text-micro Tailwind utility backed by --text-micro token (0.625rem) added to globals.css @theme.

findings.description: Layout refactor 2026-04-21: (a) removed Supply/Borrow APY sublabels from the asset Select dropdown (noisy at per-row level — rates live in the APY card below); (b) consolidated Asset / Amount / Max slippage into a single 3-col grid with equal widths and h-8 controls (SelectTrigger size="sm" to match Input h-8); (c) merged the Supply/Borrow APY card and the Health Factor preview card into a 2-col grid, moving the collateral ratio row into the APY card.
knownIssues still listed "Mock import: calculateHealthFactorDelta, getAssetParams" even though 0.5 already passed — these flow through useDeFiData() context, not direct widget import.
findings.fix: Cleared stale knownIssues entry to match 0.5 pass note.

changelog.summary: Layout refactor: APY sublabels dropped from asset Select; Asset / Amount / Max slippage consolidated into a 3-col equal-width row (h-8 controls via SelectTrigger size="sm"); Supply/Borrow APY card merged with Health Factor card into a 2-col grid with collateral ratio moved into the APY card. Cert drift fixes: 7.3 line count 288→287, 8.1 text-micro line refs updated (dropped 119 which no longer exists), stale knownIssues cleared.
